context: Tests whether the response designs an optimal compound index following MongoDB's ESR rule.

checklist.name: Creates compound index with correct field order
checklist.description: Proposes a compound index like { customerId: 1, status: 1, createdAt: -1 } following Equality-Sort-Range principles

checklist.name: Explains field ordering rationale
checklist.description: Explains why equality fields come first (narrow the set), then sort field (avoid in-memory sort)

checklist.name: Sort direction matches query
checklist.description: The createdAt index direction matches the sort direction in the query (-1 for descending)

checklist.name: Mentions explain() for verification
checklist.description: Suggests using .explain() to verify the query plan uses the index and avoids SORT stage

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about MongoDB indexing
